C:\msys64\mingw32\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\AegisAI.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw32\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\AegisAI.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\AegisAI.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw32\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\AegisAI.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o AegisAI.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libAegisAI.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\AegisAI.dir\linkLibs.rsp
